conflict: Fuel audit, lost access to night channels, and money problems made newly visible
consequence: Tomas is suspended, the triangle splits along class and blame lines, and Mina loses easy access to the creek.
must_land_beats: Tomas is pulled off the night route because the fuel numbers no longer hide.
Rhea has to decide whether to protect her marriage, her housing, or Mina's obsession.
Camp finances surface as an immediate survival issue rather than background stress.
pressure_source: Fuel audit, lost access to night channels, and money problems made newly visible
